modifiers.name: Frenzy
modifiers.description: Enemies move and attack faster. New waves arrive sooner.

modifiers.name: Armoured
modifiers.description: Enemies take more punishment before they go down.

modifiers.name: Inferno
modifiers.description: Standing still burns. Keep moving or take damage.

modifiers.name: Explosive Death
modifiers.description: Enemies explode when they die. Stay clear of the blast.

modifiers.name: Stampede
modifiers.description: Enemies crash harder on contact and push closer.

modifiers.name: Crossfire
modifiers.description: Ranged enemies pressure the room with faster volleys.
